headline: Roadcheck Week, Supreme Court ruling tighten US freight capacity
summary: A mix of trucking enforcement activity, insurance concerns and seasonal freight demand could keep pressure on freight capacity through 2026, EASE Logistics says. The post Roadcheck Week, Supreme Court ruling tighten US freight capacity appeared first on FreightWaves.
